programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2 - Zap Attack 2: Gamers test their electrifying memory skills in this puzzle! To play this level search "Kidaverse" on Roblox.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2 - Jungle Jump 2: Gamers race through the jungle in this tropical obby! To play this level search "Kidaverse" on Roblox.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble 2 - Garden Gauntlet 2: Gamers try not to get lost in this garden hedge maze! To play this level search "Kidaverse" on Roblox.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Calling Fowl / Treehouse Trouble: The Rangers discover Preston Praxton is feeding ducks to keep them off his golf course and it's making them sick. / Preston is harvesting trees so Patty can build her massive dream treehouse, and is in turn destroying the forest.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: Rainbow Rangers - Car Wash / Preston's Shipwreck: Preston's washing his car in his orchard and the runoff from the chemicals in the soap is polluting the riverbed and harming animals. / Preston's determination to find treasure in an old pirate shipwreck threatens an inter-marine-species Utopian paradise.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - Bessie We Hardly Knew Ye: Vik's quest to find Bessie the lake monster teaches everyone that just because you can't see something doesn't mean it isn't real.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Superhero Kindergarten - The Magic Ring: A trip to meet Mr. Arnold's friends Penn and Teller leads to a magical mystery that only the Super K's can solve: what happened to Houdini's Ring?

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Piggies From The Deep & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Piggies From The Deep", "Oh Gnome!" and more!

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Angry Birds - Chucked Out, Bomb's Awake & More: Fun adventure episodes from Angry Birds, Piggy Tales and Stella! In this episode watch "Chucked Out", "Bomb's Awake" and more!

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - To Shark or Not to Shark: Dr. Piranoid turns the Sharks human again as part of a plot to make the transformation permanent.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Street Sharks - Eco Shark: Investigating whale attacks, the Sharks and Moby Lick uncover Malcolm Medusa III's secret polluted sanctuary, hidden by holograms.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Roadsterball / Blond is Back!: Klaus' longtime nemesis, Niccolo Tessio, challenges the Paq to a game of Roadsterball. Team leader Klaus only chooses the fastest and strongest of the Paq to help, but it doesn't go the way he planned. Klaus must figure out a way to utilize all of the strengths of the Paq members or they'll loose the game. / Shaq has a big surprise for Fleming. He's invited the actor who played James Blond, Ian Connery, to come visit. Ian always wished they could have gone on a real mission together and Fleming feels the same way.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Close Encounters of the Bad Kind / Gold Fever!: Dawkins and Himari are driving back to the garage at night and he is pointing out different stars to her and she is bored. Dawkins sees a strange star that he's never seen before. Then, the star moves across the sky and crashes in the distance. An alien captures them, intending to take them back to his planet as spare parts and they must find a way to escape before the ship takes off. / Boone tells The Paq about the story of The Lost Scotchman's Mine, a legendary treasure buried deep in the hills or Orlanta. Is it a myth or real? Fleming, Gronk, and Himari all decide to find out.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Big Hike / Back to the Jurassic: Nine kids from the Boys & Girls Club go on a nature hike with Boone, Fleming, and Gronk. Gronk tries to follow Shaq's rule of staying on the trail, but one of his adventurous kids convinces him to go explore. When they get lost, they have to find their way back to the trail before nightfall. / Dawkins invites Biggie D, Fleming, and Himari to a viewing of a rare daylight lunar eclipse out in the wilderness. When a mysterious fog appears and transports them back to the Jurassic Era, the Paq must find their way back a fast as possible. What they didn't plan on was an extra passenger back to the present: a baby T-Rex!

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Dax eyes a film called "Ninja Rumba" as his big break as an actor.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A mild-mannered mechanic turns into a creature that wants Crimson Ranger's power for a bizarre experiment.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A benevolent alien comes to Earth searching for a Red Power Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kira is conflicted when a music manager compromises her own style.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Elsa works on her plan to shoot a powerful laser beam at Jupiter.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers obtain new Zords to defeat Piranhtis Head.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd attacks with a monster that can morph from one Power Ranger into another.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd casts a spell on the Power Rangers.

programme.desc: Thanks to Carnisoar's training, Jarrod has become more ruthless than ever.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Casey anxiously awaits the arrival of his second master, but RJ begins to feel forgotten as a result.

programme.title: Power Rangers

programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the punks in the Hooligang cruise into Quiet Lawn Cavern, they think no one there's got the guts to stand up to them so they trash the place.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can't find a way to fix what's wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang's Mecha Beasts, it's time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge! Hoping to find the cause of the glitch, the gang instead uncovers a huge conspiracy - hatched by Dr. Blakk!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli doesn't believe in ghosts - until he enters Deadweed cavern! But it turns out Eli's first instinct was right. What lurks inside Deadweed is far more evil than ghosts, its El Diablus Nacho, after a supply of the dangerous Dark Water that Dr. Blakk uses to turn innocent slugs into Ghouls.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A short cut takes the Shane Gang through the territory of the Shadow Clan - and try as they might not to, they are discovered and captured by the mysterious creatures. Just when it looks like our heroes are done for, they are helped out of this jam by a most unlikely savior.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Long thought to be merely a legend, an Enigmo Slug has finally been spotted. The bidding is high for this rarest of all slugs, and so is the competition to be the first grab it! Eli and the gang actually beat Slugterra's most vicious slug hunter to the prize-only to find that the hunter is now hunting them!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After a wild ride on the mysterious Flumes - the Underriver that runs beneath all of Slugterra - the Shane gang find themselves dropped into a sea cavern.

programme.title: Slugterra

With Pronto zombified (not entirely a bad thing, the others kind of like this new, quieter, more monosyllabic Pronto), the rest of the Shane Gang must find the mysterious Mr. Saturday who controls the Zombus slugs-and find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The four members of the Shane Gang think they've found the fifth in Twist, a street-smart kid who volunteers his help when the gang needs it most on a mission gone wrong. But Twist harbors a dark secret that could doom the mission - and the Shane Gang.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Avalanched inside a frozen cavern, the Shane Gang can't figure out which is worse: being trapped with a vicious Ice Ogre that only gets bigger the more you shoot it?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A thief breaks into the Shane Gang HQ looking for the fabled "Shane Treasure" - a portion of which she believes belongs to her. The thief escapes with nothing, but Eli does manage to find a treasure chest. To unlock it, the thief and the gang will need to travel to a remote, dangerous cavern to find a special slug. The journey is fraught with peril, and when they finally open the box, what's inside is not at all what they were expecting...

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Notorious con man Gar Rivelle has many convinced he has discovered the way to a secret land... a land that seems to be the surface! Eli uncovers the truth - Gar is getting his information from a coded Shane diary. Keeping the surface secret is Eli's number one mission, so he steals the diary from Gar, sparking an all-out siege on the Shane HQ. Eli realizes that for him to continue in Slugterra, he's going to have to confide his greatest secret to his friends.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Driven by his intense slug phobia, scientist Quentin Kozinski has invented mechanical slugs. programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.desc: The Eurasian BEAVER is a keystone species. / DJ RED the robin redbreast might just be the world's favourite bird. / HUMPDY is a majestic HUMPBACK WHALE. / A small and quick diving bird, LADY KING, the electric blue kingfisher perches high above the slow-moving waters of rivers and streams. / BIG SONNY the mammoth Ocean Sunfish is super unique in appearance and style. / WILLY-T teaches us in his song, “I'm the white-tailed Eagle”, that these eagles where once a species of concern- they were almost extinct, but now they are making a comeback!

programme.title: Urban Tails
programme.desc: MISS MABEL, the Eurasian MAGPIE, is one of the world's most intelligent creatures, she can even recognize herself in the mirror! / Don't get it twisted, DR NEWTON ain't no lizard he is a sleek stylish SMOOTH NEWT who likes the quiet life of slow-moving waters. / MC JACKY T is a rare NATTERJACK TOAD with a big voice! / HYPA HYENA, the cool spotted hyena from sub-saharan Africa, invites us to laugh along with her as we learn cool hyena facts. / The size of a house cat, LIL' P is a funky phat PINE MARTEN on the rise! On her track “The Pine Rhyme” she lets us know that she adores feasting on fruit, insects, small animals too, BUT her favourite food are bilberries, whose blue colouring turns her poop blue!!! / SIR FEATHAZ & LADY FEATHAZ are noisy and gregarious COMMON STARLINGS. They show us that they are very sociable birds, experts at mimicry and of course experts at mesmerizing aerial displays.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making a giant Tricky Sticky Rice Dumpling and need six handfuls of tricky stick rice. Gathering the rice should be no problem, however, when the sticky rice comes alive, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble find themselves in a sticky situation! Can they get the rice they need to the kitchen to the Cooking Countdown, or will the tricky stick rice plants chase them out of town? / The Bumble Nums are making a Chilly Cherry Cheesecake and need nine chilly cherries of different sizes! Once the cherries chill to the proper temperature, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble get to picking! The recipe calls for three small cherries, three medium cherries, and three big cherries. Can they gather the right sizes and get the ingredients to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? / The Bumble Nums are making Boogie Down Baba Ganoush and need four boogieing eggplants! So, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble break out their best dance moves to get the eggplants moving and help catch them! But, how can they get the ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown? Maybe a boogie down conga line will work?

programme.title: The Bumble Nums
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making delicious Boomerang Banana Splits and need three boomeranging bananas! Humble, Grumble, and Stumble believe catching boomeranging bananas is so easy! But, is it? Can the Bumble Nums bag the three bananas they need in time for the Cooking Countdown? / Mmm. Today, the Bumble Nums are making Mouthwatering Mac and Cheese! They need to wrangle six speedy cheese wheels from the barn. After a wild ride corralling the speedy cheese wheels, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble must race the secret ingredient to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown. Will they make it in time to make their mouthwatering meal?

programme.title: Vencer el pasado
programme.desc: Darío y Javier buscan la manera de demostrar que Lisandro es un ladrón. Nieves teme que por culpa de Griselda, Renata sepa la verdad sobre su origen. Javier le pide a Darío que termine su relación con Fabiola.

programme.title: Vencer el pasado
programme.desc: Norma le agradece a Mariluz por haber pagado la operación de Oscarito. Mariluz acepta prestarle su vientre a Fabiola. Brenda le pide a Renata que la ayude a convencer Javier de irse de la ciudad. Darío le confiesa a Diego que Priscila es su madre.

programme.title: Vencer el pasado
programme.desc: Rodrigo se impresiona cuando descubre que su madre está viva. Carmen intenta que Ulises se reconcilie con Mariluz. Renata y Mariluz buscan la manera de evitar que Gino le haga daño a Danna. Brenda decide venderle sus acciones a Norberto.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: La huída
programme.desc: Marina y Renata encuentran a Saúl en Las Vegas y lo obligan a decir la verdad. Una vez que reciba el dinero del fideicomiso, Roberta planea irse a Suiza con Fina. Constanza informa que Roberta y Germán eran amantes.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Al fin juntos

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Sinceridad

programme.title: Destilando amor: Sola y perdida
programme.desc: Gaviota viaja a París creyendo que será modelo, pero en realidad es una casa de citas. Gaviota logra escapar y vaga por las calles de París, hasta que un hombre decide apiadarse de ella.

programme.title: Teresa: Celos
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Paulo que le duele verlo con Aída. Armando le dice a Teresa que Mariano usó el anillo de compromiso para ayudarlo a pagar una deuda. Paulo decide terminar su relación con Aída.

programme.title: Rubí: Arrepentida

programme.title: Amor real: Adolfo cegado

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: José visita a Teo en el hospital y le dice que lo ama. Alma toma la decisión de irse debido al comportamiento de Roberta. Giovanni les confiesa que sabe dónde están los archivos de La Logia.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pascual y el Lic. Mendiola llegan a un acuerdo para que nadie se entere sobre "La Logia". Roberta trata de hablar con su madre pero Alma sigue muy dolida. Giovanni es expulsado del colegio. Pilar se confiesa con su padre.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Enrique le hace saber a todo el colegio que la escuela opera bajo una logia y León sugiere clausurar el colegio. Carlo le propone una nueva oportunidad de trabajo en Estados Unidos a Alma. Juan discute con su papá por haberse unido a la logia.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Ante el problema de la gaceta, Miguel defiende a Mia y dice que él es su novio. Roberta le dice a Luján que Teo se muere por ella, pero Luján no le cree. Gastón agradece a Miguel por haber dicho que él es el novio de Mia.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: Gemelos
programme.desc: Marina le anuncia a Jerónimo que van a tener gemelos y estalla en felicidad. Benjamín le aconseja a Chema que no vaya a ver el médico, temiendo que se entere de la verdad. A Renata no le cae en gracia la idea de que Jerónimo tenga gemelos.

programme.title: Pasión

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Liberan a Santiago. Los hombres de Ricardo entran a casa de Lafont buscando el dinero robado. Sofía le pide a Ofelia revelar que Santiago es hijo de Jorge.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Ofelia le dice al sacerdote la verdad sobre Santiago como secreto de confesión. Alberto visita a Gaspar para preguntar por Ricardo. Lisabeta busca cómo arruinar la boda de Ricardo y Camila.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Inés le dice a Santiago que ya no se quiere casar. Ricardo y Mario buscan pruebas para inculpar a Jorge. Camila pide la compra de la concesión.

programme.desc: Juan y Sofía tienen que refugiarse de la lluvia y pasan la noche juntos. Eva encuentra a Ruth, pero no se atreve a decirle que es su madre. Sofía lleva a las huérfanas a su casa.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Gabriela pretende adoptar a las niñas huérfanas para que ni Sofía ni Juan puedan descubrir cuál es su hija. Fernando se encarga de eliminar al doctor Gómez y desviar las sospechas de Juan sobre él.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Gabriela atribuye las recientes muertes del doctor, Armando y Rosario a Fernando. Juan y Sofía deciden adoptar a las tres niñas, pero descubren que Gabriela hizo la solicitud antes que ellos.

programme.desc: Un abuelo alcohólico enferma gravemente. Su médico dice que sólo un gran susto puede curarlo y su nieto decide dárselo.

programme.title: Doctor Satán y la magia negra
programme.desc: Debido a una venganza, el dios del vudú ordena a su gran sacerdote ir a la Tierra para destruir a un vampiro oriental.

programme.desc: Un apuesto hombre divertido y seductor intenta conquistar a una bella joven, que resulta ser un travesti.

programme.desc: Una singular narración de la historia de Adán y Eva durante su estadía en el Edén y su subsecuente expulsión.

programme.desc: Un juez ayuda a un borracho de la calle a dejar su adicción, cambiar su vida y ser un ciudadano decente.

programme.title: La liga de las muchachas
programme.desc: Una mujer funda una liga femenina para luchar contra la tiranía masculina y sus esposos tratan de hacerlas cambiar de parecer.

programme.title: Lágrimas de amor
programme.desc: Un viudo, cajero de un banco, es manipulado por una mala mujer, a quien termina matando y le echa la culpa a otro.

programme.title: México nunca duerme
programme.desc: Una joven va con su novio a bailar y la abuela de ella sale a buscarla de noche en delegaciones, discotecas y cabarets.

programme.title: Marejada
programme.desc: Un médico va a trabajar a la costa, pero el presidente municipal lo recibe con indiferencia y solo se hace amigo de un niño.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven se obsesiona con su profesor y trata de tener una relación con él, pero él la rechaza. La chica hace unas pruebas falsas para que todos crean que él trató de seducirla.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Don Tomás y su esposa Lupe están por inaugurar su cafetería, mientras eligen el nombre que llevará, ella sufre un desmayo y la llevan al hospital. Lupe muere y después de un triste funeral, los hijos de Don Tomás deciden con quién se quedará.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven es desalojado de su casa porque su madre la hipotecó y nunca hizo ningún pago. Su madre sufre un accidente y pierde la memoria él cree que lo abandonó, sus vecinos lo ayudan y le dan hospedaje en su casa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Miriam es una adolescente que, por falta de atención de sus padres, cae en una broma pesada por internet. El padre de Miriam es aficionado a ver páginas en internet de adolescentes y encuentra las fotos de su hija en una página prohibida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Sebastian es un joven pintor que quiere conseguir a la mejor modelo para el concurso anual de retrato desnudo de la academia donde estudia. Sin embargo se enamora de María Domínguez lo cual provoca una disputa con Gala.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Dime de que presumes y te diré de que careces
programme.desc: Diana es una chica que se lastima a sí misma para llamar la atención y sentir un alivio ante los problemas que existen en su casa. Diana se enamora de Adrián, un nuevo compañero de la escuela pero provoca los celos de Rebeca, su mejor amiga.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven se dedica a vender drogas en su escuela, un profesor se entera y lo denuncia. El joven les cuenta a los hombres que le venden la droga sobre su profesor y ellos lo golpean hasta dejarlo inconsciente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Pedro queda viudo justo cuando su mujer acababa de tener un hijo. Tras este terrible suceso, su hermano y su esposa intentan aprovecharse de él. Después de un tiempo se da cuenta que su hermano no hace nada y se está aprovechando de él.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Herbie Mann, Marc Cohen, Romero Lubambo & Paul Socolow
programme.desc: 'Münchner Klaviersommer' was an annual concerts series that took place from 1981 to 1998 in Munich, Germany. Although the festival's name suggests a strong focus on piano music, it featured countless famous musicians from jazz and classical music – not just pianists. The concerts were usually held in July at The Gasteig, home of the Munich Philharmonic. In 1990, American flautist Herbert Jay Solomon, better known by his stage name Herbie Mann, was one of the artists appearing here. Together with Marc Cohen on piano, Romero Lubambo on guitar, Paul Socolow on bass, and both Ricky Sebastian and Cyro Baptista on percussion, Herbie Mann performs his infectious take on Brazilian-inspired music in this concert titled 'Jasil Brazz'.

programme.title: Jimmy Smith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Charles Bradley
programme.desc: On April 26, 2012, the world-famous vocalist Charles Bradley and his Extraordinaires grace the stage of the Cigale in Paris. Success did not come easily for the American. Before Bradley (1948-2017) even considered a career as a singer, he tried to make ends meet with countless odd jobs. Only in 1996 he finally followed in the footsteps of his great idol, soul icon James Brown. Brown and Bradley shared the talent to bring an audience to ecstasy. With his mix of funk, soul, and R&B, Bradley has developed a sound of his own, in which a keen ear might find a few traces of James Brown.

programme.title: George Benson & Earl Klugh
programme.sub-title: George Benson and Earl Klugh - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1987, prominent guitarist George Benson brought his band to kick off day three of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Joining him to play songs from their joint album "Collaborations" was Grammy award–winning acoustic guitarist Earl Klugh.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Chucho Valdés, Concha Buika, Rodney Barreto & Dreiser Durruthy Bombale
programme.desc: ‘Jazz a Vienne' is one of the world's most prestigious jazz festivals. Ever since 1981 it has attracted leading jazz artists, with many of them playing return engagements. Unsurprisingly, the festival's 2013 edition did not fall short of expectations: the lineup was filled with the biggest names in music. Among them were Chucho Valdes and his Afro-Cuban Messengers, the prime example of Latin-inspired jazz music. Together with vocalists Concha Buika and Dreiser Durruthy Bombale, Rodney Barreto on drums, Gaston Joya on double bass, Yaroldy Abreu Robles on congas, and Reinaldo Melian Alvarez on trumpet, the legendary pianist brings the streets of Havana to the festival's stage.

programme.title: Ballet of the Mariinsky Theatre
programme.desc: 'La Bayadère' is a three-act ballet by the French choreographer Marius Petipa. Set in 19th-century India, 'La Bayadère' tells the sad love story of the noble warrior Solor and his Nikia, a temple dancer or 'bayadère', who is poisoned by her rival, Gamzatti. The ballet features one of the most celebrated scenes of classical ballet, namely 'The Kingdom of the Shades'. In this iconic scene, Solor dreams, under the influence of opium, of reuniting with his beloved Nikia. This production of the ballet features the revised choreography by Vladimir Ponomarev and Vakhtang Chabukiani (1941), and includes dances by Konstantin Sergeyev and Nikolai Zubkovsky. The ballet's music, composed by Ludwig Minkus, is performed by the Mariinsky Orchestra under the direction of Boris Gruzin. Among the performers are Viktoria Tereshkina, Anastasia Matvienko, Vladimir Shklyarov, and Vladimir Ponomarev. This performance was recorded at the Mariinsky Theatre in St. Petersburg, Russia, in July 2014.

programme.title: Marina De Liso, Roberto Loreggian & Nicola Dal Maso
programme.sub-title: Vocal works by Monteverdi, Frescobaldi a. o.
programme.desc: The six-concert series “Io suono italiano” is dedicated to music of Italian composers and performed by Italian musicians on Italian instruments. The concert programs cover four centuries of music: from Girolamo Frescobaldi and Antonio Vivaldi to more contemporary music by Ennio Morricone and Azio Corghi. Each program presents more familiar pieces alongside lesser-known compositions. These performances were filmed at the atmospheric Teatro Sociale in Rovigo, Italy, in January 2021. In this program, Marina De Liso (soprano), Roberto Loreggian (harpsichord), and Nicola Dal Maso (violone) present vocal Baroque music. On the program are Benedetto Ferrari's Amanti io vi so dire, Barbara Strozzi's Lamento, Tradimento, and Che si può fare, Giovanni Felice Sances's Usurpator tiranno, Girolamo Frescobaldi's Partite sopra il Passacagli, and Se l'aura spira, Claudio Monteverdi's Ohimè ch'io cado, and Si dolce è il tormento.

programme.title: Conrad van Alphen
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Glass Marcano, Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours & Stéphanie-Marie Degand
programme.sub-title: Beethoven Violin Concerto & Bizet Symphony in C
programme.desc: Young Venezuelan conductor Glass Marcano is a rising star. Having played in various local youth and symphony orchestras as a violinist, her first experience conducting an ensemble followed in 2012. In September 2020, she won the Orchestra Prize at La Maestra Competition – the first orchestra direction contest for women – held in Paris. In this concert, recorded at Opéra de Tours in February 2021, Marcano leads the Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours in performances of two Romantic masterpieces. The program opens with Ludwig van Beethoven's Violin Concerto in D major, Op. 61, featuring Stéphanie-Marie Degand as the soloist. This piece is one of the most important works in its genre. The program concludes with Georges Bizet's 1855 Symphony in C major, written when the composer was only 17 years old.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances play Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Violin Concerto No. 4 in D major, K. 218. Leading violinist Grimal features as the soloist. With the exception of the first violin concerto, Mozart composed his other four violin concertos in 1775 at a time when he was concertmaster at the Salzburg court. Among his five concertos, Violin Concerto No. 4 is one of the best-known. This performance was recorded at Cité de la Musique, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Eliane Reyes
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Matthias Goerne, Vilde Frang, Nicolas Altstaedt & Stathis Karapanos
programme.sub-title: J. S. Bach - Arias, solos, and duets
programme.desc: Baritone Matthias Goerne teams up with violinist Vilde Frang, cellist Nicolas Altstaedt, flutist Stathis Karapanos, and harpsichordist Michaela Hasselt in this program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. They perform baritone arias from Bach's most beautiful cantatas, as well as solo pieces and duets. On the program are Sonata No. 3 in C major for violin solo, BWV 1005 arias ‘Hier, in meines Vaters Stätte', BWV 32 and ‘Die Welt mit allen Königreichen', BWV 59 Suite No. 5 in C minor for cello solo, BWV 1011 ‘Wenn Trost und Hülf ermangeln muß', BWV 117 ‘Ja, ja, ich halte Jesum fest', BWV 157 Invention No. 7 in E minor, BWV 778 Invention in A major, BWV 783 and ‘Welt ade, ich bin dein müde', BWV 158. This performance was recorded at St. Mary's Church in Wittenberg, Germany.

programme.title: Dreamscapes
programme.desc: After Hours S1E1 — mesmerizing late night palette and mood-setting experience. This captivating collection invites you to indulge your senses and explore the ethereal realm of nocturnal beauty. Each stroke of the brush and every carefully curated piece evokes a sense of mystery and tranquility.

programme.title: Dreamscapes
programme.desc: Surreal Psychedelic S1E2 — Explore the boundaries of perception where the mind bends & reality warps, inviting you to transcend the ordinary and embrace the extraordinary. Electric guitar, wavy synths and lush keyboards create a tidal motion of sound. Surrealism turned sonic.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.sub-title: Earth And Stars III — A Sustainable Future by Climate Art Collection
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: A Sustainable Future presented by Climate Art Collection — This collection addresses climate change awareness through art, in collaboration with the Climate Art Collection, the largest collection of climate change-related artworks in the world. It highlights the Climate Art Collection's mission to support climate initiatives through art and make scientific concepts more accessible.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.sub-title: Earth And Stars III — A Sustainable Future by Climate Art Collection
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: A Sustainable Future presented by Climate Art Collection — This collection addresses climate change awareness through art, in collaboration with the Climate Art Collection, the largest collection of climate change-related artworks in the world. It highlights the Climate Art Collection's mission to support climate initiatives through art and make scientific concepts more accessible.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Living Creatures E3: Catopia — Revel in the beauty and mystique of cats, big and small, domestic and wild. Embark on a captivating artistic voyage showcasing the allure and playful charm of these creatures, transporting viewers into a world full of feline mischief and majesty.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Living Creatures E4: Feathered Friends — Celebrate the natural beauty and diversity of birds. Explore their symbolism and captivating nature. From the elegance of birds in flight to the intricacies of their plumage, each artwork immerses viewers in the world of these winged creatures.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Fresh Awakening: Epic Landscapes III, Greens Hills & Forests E3 — Capturing the breathtaking beauty of rolling hills and lush forests. This collection blends photography and painting to showcase vibrant greenery, misty woods, and serene meadows, inviting viewers into nature's timeless embrace.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: Earth Day — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet, from splendid skyscapes and depictions of our solar system, to sprawling forests, snow-capped mountains, and marine animals. The range of styles explore our connection to the vast and vivid universe.
